title: lysimachia × pilophora
intro: Lysimachia × pilophora, also known as variegated loosestrife, is a hybrid plant in the family Primulaceae, derived from the cross between Lysimachia atropurpurea and Lysimachia nummularia. Traditionally, Lysimachia × pilophora has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is rich in flavonoids and phenolic acids, which contribute to its health benefits, including antioxidant, antiviral, and anti-cancer activities. Lysimachia × pilophora can be prepared as an herbal remedy in various forms, such as tea, tincture, and infusion, which are used to alleviate symptoms and promote overall well-being.
